Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 7+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Heritage Roof Masters to get the job done right.

“Heritage replaced our 1920s slate roof in Back Bay with synthetic slate that looks identical but performs much better. They handled all the historic commission paperwork and completed the job with zero damage to our ornate cornices. Six nor'easters later, not a single leak.”

James T. Roof Replacement
Mar 15, 2024

“When a tree limb punctured our roof during a Newton snowstorm, Heritage had a team out within hours to tarp the damage. Their insurance documentation was so thorough we had our claim approved in 48 hours. The repair blends perfectly with our Tudor's original roof.”

Lisa M. Storm Damage Repair
Jan 22, 2024

“Our Cambridge Victorian finally has gutters that don't overflow during heavy rains. Heritage replicated the original half-round profile in copper that matches our historic details. They even added hidden heating cables that have eliminated our ice dam problems completely.”

David R. Gutter Installation
Feb 10, 2024

“Heritage installed a new EPDM roof on our Quincy seafood restaurant with minimal disruption to our busy kitchen. The specialized flashing handles salt spray better than our old roof, and their quarterly maintenance program catches small issues before they become problems.”

Sarah K. Commercial Roofing
Nov 5, 2023

“The pre-purchase inspection on our Jamaica Plain triple-decker revealed $15,000 in hidden storm damage we used to negotiate the price down. Heritage's thermal imaging found moisture issues even the seller didn't know about. Worth every penny.”

Michael B. Roof Inspection
Oct 18, 2023

“Our Brookline 1930s colonial now has a standing seam metal roof that looks like it's always been there. Heritage matched the original profile perfectly and installed snow brakes that prevent dangerous slides. It's survived two winters with zero issues.”

Aisha N. Metal Roofing
Dec 3, 2023

“After three other roofers said they couldn't match our discontinued shingles, Heritage found an identical match for our South End townhouse. The repair is invisible and came with a 5-year warranty. They even cleaned all the construction dust from our rooftop deck.”

Robert L. Shingle Repair
Jan 30, 2024
Heritage Roof Masters

Trusted roofing serving Boston, MA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
